title: Yijing Hexagram 15: Qian (Modesty)
description: Hexagram 15 of the Book of Changes — the Yijing, the most ancient and influential book in Chinese civilization.
introduction: Hexagram 15 of the Book of Changes — the Yijing, the most ancient and influential book in Chinese civilization.

translation.text: Modesty creates success. The superior man carries things through. The earth above the mountain: the image of Modesty.
